summary: Comprehensive testing of FundTrack multi-group architecture completed successfully. Backend APIs tested with 100% success rate (23/23 tests passed). Frontend UI testing completed with excellent results - all major features working correctly including multi-group management, role-based access control, CRUD operations, charts, filters, and navigation. Successfully verified viewer user cannot access groups they're not members of.

design_issues.issue: Minor timeout when navigating to Utilizations page - may be related to page loading timing

passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me with admin token returns super admin user
GET /api/groups lists groups (super admin sees all)
GET /api/groups with contributor token sees only their groups
GET /api/groups/grp_csrfund0001/funds with viewer token returns 403 (not a member)
Login page renders with Google Sign-In button
Groups list page renders with group cards
Group dashboard renders with KPI cards and charts
Fund Collection page renders with funds table
Members page renders with member table and Invite Member button
Add Fund modal works and creates funds successfully
Navigation between pages within a group works
Role-based UI element visibility (Super Admin badge)
Multi-group isolation (viewer cannot access CSR group)
Proper member count display (2 members in CSR group as expected)
